name: Repeat Windows Login Failures
notes: Reports when a source IP address causes an authentication failure event at least 9 times to a single Windows host within 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 9 times with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 9 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 9 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Repeat Windows Login Failures on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 9 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Authentication: Repeat Windows Login Failures
Event description: Reports when a source IP address causes an authentication failure event at least 9 times to a single Windows host within 5 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
